databaseQueries.query: SELECT * FROM `roles` WHERE (`name` = 'panel_user') LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `users` WHERE `id` = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `farmers`
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `farms`
SELECT sum(CAST(lot_hectare AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as aggregate FROM `farms`
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease`
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE `severity` = 'high' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `soil_analysis`
SELECT avg(`ph_level`) as aggregate FROM `soil_analysis`
SELECT severity, COUNT(*) as count FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE `validation_status` = 'approved' and `date_detected` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-02-25' GROUP BY `severity`
SELECT validation_status, COUNT(*) as count FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE `date_detected` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-02-25' GROUP BY `validation_status`
SELECT pest, COUNT(*) as count FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE `validation_status` = 'approved' and `date_detected` between '2026-01-01' and '2026-02-25' GROUP BY `pest` ORDER BY `count` DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '03' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '04' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '05' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '06' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '07' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '08' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '09' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '10' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '11' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2025 and month(`date_detected`) = '12' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2026 and month(`date_detected`) = '01' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE year(`date_detected`) = 2026 and month(`date_detected`) = '02' and `validation_status` = 'approved'
SELECT municipality, COUNT(*) as count FROM `farms` WHERE `municipality` IS not NULL and `municipality` != '' GROUP BY `municipality` ORDER BY `count` DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT CASE
            WHEN ph_level < 5.5 THEN "Very Acidic (< 5.5)"
            WHEN ph_level >= 5.5 AND ph_level < 6.0 THEN "Acidic (5.5–6.0)"
            WHEN ph_level >= 6.0 AND ph_level < 6.5 THEN "Slightly Acidic (6.0–6.5)"
            WHEN ph_level >= 6.5 AND ph_level < 7.0 THEN "Neutral (6.5–7.0)"
            ELSE "Alkaline (> 7.0)"
        END as ph_range, COUNT(*) as count FROM `soil_analysis` WHERE `ph_level` IS not NULL GROUP BY `ph_range`
